sourcesContent:
import React from 'react' import aboutMeHero from '../../assets/AboutMeHero.JPG' import './AboutMePage.css' const AboutMePage = () => { return (

About Me

Hey! I'm Luke. I'm a third year Finance turned Computer Science major at UGA, but I've been programming since my Sophomore year of high school. I've always been drawn to the amount of different opportunities available in tech, and love integrating my creative endeavors with Computer Science.

I recently took on a Software Engineering role at a telehealth company in Sweden, and I've been working on this startup of mine for the past year. Both roles have really allowed me to discover my passion for product and design.

I love seeing ideas come to life.

Outside of work and school I write, record, produce, and release my own music to major streaming platforms like Spotify and Apple Music. I cook a lot too (as much as my student budget allows me), and will take any opportunity I get to explore more of this beautiful Earth.

) } export default AboutMePage
